REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-23-2022 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** DERRICK UHRI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT MASOUD KAMALI APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. PLAINTIFF MADE AN ORAL REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL FOR 90 DAYS DUE TO UNABLE TO GET A WITNESS. COURT DENIES THE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS THE CASE BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
